sourcesContent:
import '../styles/projects.css' const PROJECTS = [ { id: '01', title: 'Smart Water Level Monitoring System', description: 'An IoT-based system to monitor water levels in storage tanks using sensors and microcontrollers. ' + 'Implemented real-time alerts when levels reach critical thresholds. Used Python to log and analyse ' + 'usage patterns to reduce water wastage and improve resource management.', tech: ['Python', 'IoT', 'Sensors', 'Microcontrollers', 'Data Logging'], github: 'https://github.com/harshinidevinakka', live: '#', featured: true, }, { id: '02', title: 'Automated News Summarization System', description: 'A Python application that extracts and summarises key information from news articles using basic ' + 'NLP techniques. Automates data extraction from online sources and reduces lengthy articles into ' + 'quick, readable summaries to improve information accessibility.', tech: ['Python', 'NLP', 'Web Scraping', 'Automation'], github: 'https://github.com/harshinidevinakka', live: '#', featured: false, }, { id: '03', title: 'Personal Portfolio Website', description: 'This portfolio website built with React.js as part of learning full-stack web development. ' + 'Features a dark modern UI, responsive design, smooth scrolling, and a contact form ' + 'connected to a Node.js + MongoDB backend.', tech: ['React.js', 'CSS', 'Node.js', 'MongoDB'], github: 'https://github.com/harshinidevinakka', live: '#', featured: false, }, ] const GithubIcon = () => ( ) const ExternalIcon = () => ( ) const ProjectCard = ({ project }) => (
{project.id}

{project.title}

{project.description}

{project.tech.map(t => {t})}
Code {project.live !== '#' && ( Live Demo )}
) const Projects = () => (
My Work

Featured Projects

Projects I've built to apply my skills and solve real-world problems

{PROJECTS.map(p => )}
View GitHub Profile
) export default Projects
